title: erioneuron avenaceum var. avenaceum
intro: Erioneuron avenaceum var. avenaceum, also known as the desert grama grass, is a perennial grass native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Erioneuron avenaceum var. avenaceum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to make medicine, although its safety and efficacy have not been extensively scientifically proven.
